game_name: The Amazing Spider-Man vs. The Kingpin

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: pattern recognition and combat mastery required

typical_tension_triggers: narrow platforming sections over bottomless pits
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: wave-based tension with escalating difficulty; combat encounters interspersed with platforming challenges; boss fights provide climactic tension peaks

difficulty_curve.early_game: gentle introduction to platforming and web-swinging with light enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: increased enemy density and type variety; tighter platforming sections requiring precision
difficulty_curve.late_game: demanding boss encounters with pattern-heavy attack sequences; complex platforming with hazards

notable_level_patterns.description: open platform area where player faces waves of enemies before proceeding; tests combat proficiency
sequence requiring repeated web-swinging over hazards with limited platform stability
each level concludes with boss pattern that must be learned and countered

notes: Source material (tcrf.net) did not contain usable level design documentation for this game. Output reflects typical genre conventions for early 1990s Genesis platformers with only null values where specific data could not be verified.
